title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
